series_metadata.series_description: Copies of certificates submitted annually by custodial banks to the Trust department that indicate the types and amounts of liability insurance maintained by the respective bank. Submission of such certificates to the Treasurer is required by the respective custody agreements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
